page: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server in the Bare Metal NVMe family, powered by an Intel Xeon 2288G processor. This x86_64 architecture CPU features 8 physical cores and 16 virtual cores (vCPUs) with a base clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The system includes 128.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. Local storage is provided by a 3840 GB NVMe SSD. The server does not include a GPU.

Benchmark results show average performance in stress-ng single-core (2024.2) and multi-core (19837.37) tests. The server demonstrates top-tier performance in single-threaded gzip compression (36.22 GB/sec) and strong performance in single-threaded bzip3 decompression (14.23 GB/sec). PassMark memory testing ranks in the top tier with a score of 3594.89. However, memory bandwidth for large uncached blocks (256MB) is weak, measuring 29.76 GB/sec for read-only and 15.32 GB/sec for write operations.

The server offers high resource density with dedicated hardware, combining a high-capacity 3840 GB NVMe SSD with 128.0 GB of RAM. This configuration is suitable for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution, high local storage capacity, and substantial memory, such as relational databases, static web serving, and data decompression tasks. The lack of GPU acceleration makes it unsuitable for machine learning training or heavy parallel computing workloads.
description: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server featuring an 8-core, 16-thread Intel Xeon 2288G processor running at 3.7 GHz. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of DDR4 RAM and a 3840 GB local NVMe SSD. Benchmarks indicate top-tier performance in single-threaded gzip compression and PassMark memory tests, alongside average multi-core CPU and database performance. However, uncached large-block memory bandwidth is weak. This server is configured for database hosting, static web serving, and memory-intensive applications requiring dedicated hardware.
og_description: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server featuring an 8-core Intel Xeon 2288G CPU, 128 GB DDR4 RAM, and 3840 GB NVMe storage, delivering strong memory and single-threaded compression performance.
meta_description: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server with an 8-core Intel Xeon CPU, 128 GB DDR4 RAM, and 3840 GB NVMe storage for database and web workloads.
tagline: A dedicated bare metal server combining an eight-core Intel Xeon processor, 128 GB DDR4 RAM, and high-capacity NVMe storage.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 2288G processor with 8 physical cores and 16 threads at 3.7 GHz
128.0 GB of DDR4 RAM and a 3840 GB local NVMe SSD
Top-tier single-threaded gzip compression and PassMark memory performance
Weak uncached large-block memory read and write bandwidth
Suitable for database hosting, static web serving, and memory-intensive workloads
